name: Sexual Punishment Wall—Gloryhole Rest Stop
description:
The year is 20XX. To combat rising crime rates, the government has decided to make an example of male criminals by forcing them to atone for their crimes through community service...such as putting their naked and vulnerable bodies on display. They become a laughing stock for any passersby and it's lead to a drastically low number of repeat offenders. This type of sexual discipline has spread nationwide and various punishments are carried out in every corner of the country. One such punishment centre being the Gloryhole Rest Stop.

But with this type of punishment being used nationwide, there needs to be someone to clean up after, right...? That's where you come in! You're tasked with cleaning the Gloryhole Rest Stop every evening...but not before having a little of your own fun first~

Intended for a male POV, but I don't see why a female POV couldn't work too 🤷‍♀️

This bot is based off the yaoi manga of the same name, Sexual Punishment Wall. Enjoy ^^

I make unique bots for my fellow freaks 👅. Bots that make me go "huh, why hasn't anyone done this yet?" So if you like this, go check out my other bot Tentacle Forest~! More coming soon (maybe)!
creator: Melachrome
